name: merkle
description: Merkle hash tree over the spec: leaf hashes, interior hashes, snapshots, diff, and impact classification.

requirements.title: Compute leaf hashes
requirements.description: Hash each markdown content file and each JSON file in the spec. Leaf nodes in the merkle tree.

requirements.title: Compute interior hashes
requirements.description: Interior node hashes are computed from the sorted concatenation of their children's hashes. Tree mirrors spec hierarchy: project → module → {arch, impl} → leaves.

requirements.title: Store snapshots
requirements.description: Write the complete hash tree to a snapshot file committed to git alongside the spec.

requirements.title: Diff against snapshot
requirements.description: Compare current hash tree against a stored snapshot. Report changed leaves and changed paths (interior nodes whose hash changed).

requirements.title: Classify impact
requirements.description: Classify each change as impl-only (only impl_section leaves changed), arch+impl (component leaves changed), or structural (module.json or project.json changed).

requirements.title: Deterministic hashing
requirements.description: Same file content always produces the same hash. Hash computation is order-independent for interior nodes (children sorted before hashing).

requirements.title: ID-based tree keying
requirements.description: Tree nodes are keyed by spec ID (module ID, component ID, etc.) instead of file path. Renaming a directory or file with the same ID is detected as a modification, not a delete + add.

components.name: Hasher
components.description: Computes SHA-256 hashes for individual files (leaf nodes) and for sorted child hash lists (interior nodes).

components.name: TreeBuilder
components.description: Builds the merkle tree from the parsed spec graph. Nodes carry the spec ID (module ID, component ID, etc.) as their key, not the file path. Maps spec hierarchy to tree nodes.

components.name: SnapshotStore
components.description: Reads and writes snapshot files. Serializes the ID-keyed hash tree to a JSON file for git storage. The flat map is keyed by spec ID (id → {hash, type, ...}), not by file path.

components.name: DiffEngine
components.description: Compares two ID-keyed hash trees (current vs snapshot). Same ID + different hash = modified. ID in current but not snapshot = added. ID in snapshot but not current = removed.

components.name: ImpactClassifier
components.description: Analyzes diff results to classify changes by their impact level: impl-only, arch+impl, or structural. Uses node metadata (type, module association) instead of parsing path prefixes.

components.name: HashCommand
components.description: CLI entry point for spex hash. Parses flags, wires Hasher and TreeBuilder to compute the merkle tree, SnapshotStore to save it.

components.name: DiffCommand
components.description: CLI entry point for spex diff. Compares current merkle tree against stored snapshot via DiffEngine, classifies impact via ImpactClassifier.

data_flows.name: Hash computation flow
data_flows.description: Spec files are hashed bottom-up: leaf files → interior nodes → tree root. The tree is then serialized to a snapshot.

data_flows.name: Diff and classification flow
data_flows.description: Current tree and stored snapshot are compared node-by-node. Changed paths are classified by impact level.
